channel.title: Mlflow on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Mlflow on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Model Registry & Model Versioning: MLflow vs ClearML vs DVC
item.description: As machine learning models move from experimental notebooks to production systems, managing model versions, tracking lineage, and controlling deployment stages becomes critical. A model registry provides a centralized store for model artifacts, metadata, and lifecycle management — from initial training through staging to production deployment.
